summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Auth, Registration, Admin Setup, and Admin Panel features. All 16 backend tests passed. All UI flows working correctly including registration, login, admin setup via secret key, and admin promote/demote functionality.
passed_tests: User login with demo@b4b.com / password123 - PASS
User login with invalid credentials returns 401 - PASS
User registration creates new account and auto-logs in - PASS
User registration returns token and user data with is_admin=false - PASS
Duplicate email registration returns 400 error - PASS
POST /api/admin/self-promote without auth returns 401 - PASS
POST /api/admin/self-promote with wrong key returns 403 - PASS
POST /api/admin/self-promote with correct key (b4b-admin-2024) promotes user - PASS
PUT /api/admin/users/{id}/toggle-admin without auth returns 401 - PASS
PUT /api/admin/users/{id}/toggle-admin as non-admin returns 403 - PASS
PUT /api/admin/users/{id}/toggle-admin toggles user admin status - PASS
Admin cannot toggle their own admin status (returns 400) - PASS
GET /api/admin/stats returns dashboard stats - PASS
GET /api/admin/users returns user list without passwords - PASS
Auth page /auth loads with login/register tabs - PASS
Login form has email, password inputs and submit button - PASS
Register form has name, email, password, city, country fields - PASS
Register form validation shows error for empty fields - PASS
Admin Setup page /admin-setup shows 'Sign in Required' when not logged in - PASS
Admin Setup page shows setup form when logged in - PASS
Admin Setup with correct key shows success page - PASS
Admin Setup success page has 'Go to Admin Panel' button - PASS
Admin Panel /admin loads for admin users - PASS
Admin Panel has Overview, Moderation, Posts, Comments, Users tabs - PASS
Admin Panel Users tab shows user list with Make Admin/Remove Admin buttons - PASS
Make Admin button promotes user and changes to Remove Admin - PASS
Remove Admin button demotes user and changes to Make Admin - PASS
Admin link appears in user dropdown for admin users - PASS
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed users during testing for registration and admin toggle tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth and Admin features fully tested. Registration creates non-admin users by default. Admin setup via /admin-setup requires secret key 'b4b-admin-2024'. Admin panel promote/demote buttons working correctly. Test users with TEST_ prefix created during testing.
